testcase.name: test_get_all_lab_data

failure.message: AssertionError: <coroutine object get_all_labs_data at 0x1091f5fc0> is not an instance of <class 'list'>

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.lab_test.LabTest testMethod=test_get_all_lab_data>
@responses.activate def test_get_all_lab_data(self): responses.add( responses.GET, create_test_url("BELLEFIELD"), json=lab_mocks.mocked_bellefield_data, ) responses.add( responses.GET, create_test_url("LAWRENCE"), json=lab_mocks.mocked_lawrence_data, ) responses.add( responses.GET, create_test_url("SUTH"), json=lab_mocks.mocked_sutherland_data, ) responses.add( responses.GET, create_test_url("CATH_G27"), json=lab_mocks.mocked_cathy_g27_data, ) responses.add( responses.GET, create_test_url("CATH_G62"), json=lab_mocks.mocked_cathy_g62_data, ) responses.add( responses.GET, create_test_url("BENEDUM"), json=lab_mocks.mocked_benedum_data, )
results = lab.get_all_labs_data()
> self.assertIsInstance(results, list) E AssertionError: <coroutine object get_all_labs_data at 0x1091f5fc0> is not an instance of <class 'list'>
tests/lab_test.py:212: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_handle_invalid_lab_id
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.lab_test.LabTest testMethod=test_handle_invalid_lab_id>
@responses.activate def test_handle_invalid_lab_id(self): responses.add( responses.GET, create_test_url("CATH_G27"), body="Resource not found", status=404, )
> with pytest.raises( lab.LabAPIError, match="The Lab ID was invalid. Please open a GitHub issue so we can resolve this.", ): E Failed: DID NOT RAISE <class 'pittapi.lab.LabAPIError'>
tests/lab_test.py:234: Failed

testcase.name: test_handle_unexpected_fetch_err
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.lab_test.LabTest testMethod=test_handle_unexpected_fetch_err>
@responses.activate def test_handle_unexpected_fetch_err(self): responses.add( responses.GET, create_test_url("CATH_G27"), body="Unauthorized", status=401, )
> with pytest.raises( lab.LabAPIError, match="An unexpected error occurred while fetching lab data: Unauthorized", ): E Failed: DID NOT RAISE <class 'pittapi.lab.LabAPIError'>
tests/lab_test.py:249: Failed

testcase.name: test_invalid_lab_name
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.lab_test.LabTest testMethod=test_invalid_lab_name>
def test_invalid_lab_name(self): > with pytest.raises( ValueError, match="Invalid lab name: INVALID. Valid options: BELLEFIELD, LAWRENCE, SUTH, CATH_G27, CATH_G62, BENEDUM", ): E Failed: DID NOT RAISE <class 'ValueError'>
tests/lab_test.py:219: Failed
